winner: Why did the keyboard start hula-dancing at the picnic? It got a little too close to the ketchup spray.

candidates.text: A man walked into a electronics store, asked for a can of spray paint and a keyboard. The clerk looked confused and said, "Sir, those are quite different items." To which the man replied, "Yeah, I know, but I wanted to type on something new today.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'type on something new,' but it lacks surprise and specificity. The setup is a bit generic, and the humor is mild rather than striking."}

candidates.text: Why did the keyboard go outside? It wanted to feel the spray of fresh air keys!

candidates.text: Why did the keyboard start spraying water? Because it got dropped in the ocean!
